title: Make sure that we can build an RPM
body: Add a CI test that ensures that we can build an RPM package on the current version (as of this writing, 26) of Fedora, using the .spec file under contrib.

comments.body: LGTM, question/possible suggestion for a future PR if you wish.

Okay, updated to check the reported commit ID and version number.  The `%autosetup` macro called in the .spec file adds a commit for some reason, so overriding the commit ID in the top-level Makefile with the one set in the .spec file became necessary.
Okay, updated to where I think we want it.
